title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI permitted restructured borrower accounts affected by calamities to retain or regain standard classification. This ensures temporary stress does not permanently impair asset quality classification.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
